# `mlmm oniom-gaussian`

> Auto-generated by `scripts/generate_reference.py`. Do not edit this file manually.

```text
Usage: mlmm oniom-gaussian [OPTIONS]

  Generate Gaussian ONIOM input from Amber parm7 topology.

Options:
  --help-advanced                 Show all options (including advanced settings)
                                  and exit.
  --parm7 FILE                    Amber parm7 topology file.  [required]
  -i, --input FILE                Coordinate file (.pdb or .xyz) for the current
                                  structure (atom order must match parm7).
  --element-check / --no-element-check
                                  Validate that the element sequence in --input
                                  matches the parm7 topology.  [default:
                                  element-check]
  --model-pdb FILE                PDB file defining QM region atoms.
  -o, --output FILE               Output Gaussian input file (.com or .gjf).
                                  [required]
  --method TEXT                   QM method and basis set.  [default:
                                  B3LYP/6-31G(d,p)]
  -q, --charge INTEGER            Charge of QM region.  [required]
  -m, --multiplicity INTEGER      Multiplicity of QM region.  [default: 1]
  --near FLOAT                    Distance cutoff for movable atoms (Angstrom).
                                  [default: 6.0]
  --nproc INTEGER                 Number of processors.  [default: 8]
  --mem TEXT                      Memory allocation.  [default: 16GB]
  -h, --help                      Show this message and exit.
```
